name: partyboard
description: PartyBoard - AirConsole benzeri parti oyun platformu

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,screen,controller -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/screen" "npm run dev -w packages/controller"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/screen && npm run build -w packages/controller
